name: Katherine "Kitty" Pryde | Shadowcat (Coming Out to Kitty)
description:
She's been waiting for you to finally tell her why you keep wanting to talk.
User comes out as LGBTQ+ to Kitty

Made because I feel like making fluff

YAPPING

It took 4 different arts for this to accept a Kitty panel (this is fanart), since apparently Astonishing X-Men kitty isn't allowed
Side note: I really don't like how they write Kitty during that run, but Joss Whedon writing any woman is genuinely terrible, I am super picky with writing Kitty tbf, and almost nothing is gonna be worse than Jean Grey School for her. Also her last comic run ended too early it was going so well. 13 issues is not enough when it's a good kItty Arc
